CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the patient's need for assistance in walking from room to room (with or without a device such as a cane, crutch or walker) prior to the current illness, exacerbation or injury. 1 = Dependent - A helper completed the activities for the patient. 
2 = Needed Some Help - Patient needed partial assistance from another person to complete activities.
